@graph.name: Mounjaro and Zepbound Weight Loss Injection Programme in Malaysia (Kuala Lumpur)
@graph.description: Clinical trial data does not lie. Mounjaro and Zepbound (tirzepatide) produce up to 20.9% body weight loss, outperforming Ozempic in head-to-head comparisons. Nexus Clinic KL offers this weight loss injection programme in Malaysia for type 2 diabetes management and chronic weight management. GLP-1 and GIP dual-action appetite control. Personalised treatment. Book your consultation in Kuala Lumpur.
